application.name: Apple Books
application.review_path: Opened the repaired local curated-reader EPUB artifact in macOS Apple Books from the ignored build artifact path, then inspected the rendered reader window through Computer Use.
application.stateful_side_effect: Apple Books imported or retained The ASI Stack in the local Books library during review; Codex did not delete that local library item.

observations.evidence: Apple Books opened the current repaired local EPUB digest into a reader window titled The ASI Stack.
Chapter 1 rendered in Apple Books with body text, page 22 navigation state, and the ASI Stack control-plane figure exposed in the accessibility tree; the earlier XML error banner was absent.
The Apple Books reader advanced through baseline, preface, and chapter 1 pages and exposed the ASI Stack control-plane figure and descriptive alt text without an XML error banner.
The Apple Books table-of-contents popover opened and listed front matter, chapter 1, and chapter 1 section entries with page targets.

repairs_validated: EPUB XHTML audit reports zero XML parse errors.
EPUB XHTML audit reports zero bare class attributes.
EPUB XHTML audit reports zero paragraph-wrapped figure tags.
EPUB browser review reports 104 page-view pairs and zero failed page-view pairs.
EPUB key-figure layout review reports 20 page-view pairs and zero failed page-view pairs.
release_boundary: This review clears only the current curated EPUB/e-reader application blocker `app_or_ereader_review_not_completed` for the repaired local EPUB digest. It does not approve the EPUB for publication, does not approve the curated reader edition, does not publish or archive an artifact, does not create an edition release record, and does not promote any claim support state.
non_claims: does not approve the curated reader edition
does not approve the EPUB as a published artifact
does not create an edition release record
does not approve DOCX, PDF, audio, MP3, M4B, or audio-embedded EPUB artifacts
does not approve audio narration quality, chapter timing, or audiobook packaging
does not replace screen-reader review, WCAG conformance review, or manual keyboard-only review
does not promote any claim support state or chapter core claim
